channel.title: Releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in Releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Expect security releases to appear here within 24 hours of being reported upstream. HAHAHUGOSHORTCODE-0xc00084ef00-1-HBHB

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Releases will soon start to appear for Drupal 8 once stable releases are made. HAHAHUGOSHORTCODE-0xc000959900-1-HBHB
